name: register_skill
description: Validates the assembled skill definition against the skill schema and persists it to the database.

inputs.name: task_id_map
inputs.description: Map from task name to task ID

code:
import json
import uuid

def execute(inputs):
    """Validate and persist the new skill + task definitions."""
    task_id_map = inputs.get('task_id_map', {})
    if isinstance(task_id_map, str):
        task_id_map = json.loads(task_id_map)
    edges = inputs.get('edges', [])
    if isinstance(edges, str):
        edges = json.loads(edges)
    tags = inputs.get('tags', [])
    if isinstance(tags, str):
        tags = json.loads(tags)
    
    skill_name = inputs.get('skill_name', 'unnamed_skill')
    skill_id = f"{skill_name.lower().replace(' ', '_')}_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}"
    
    # Build nodes from task_id_map
    nodes = []
    for task_name, task_id in task_id_map.items():
        nodes.append({
            'node_id': task_id,
            'task_definition_id': task_id
        })
    
    skill_data = {
        'id': skill_id,
        'name': skill_name,
        'description': inputs.get('skill_description', ''),
        'tags': tags,
        'nodes': nodes,
        'edges': edges,
        'is_meta': False,
        'version': 1
    }
    
    # Validate against schema
    from schema_validator import validate_skill_schema
    errors = validate_skill_schema(skill_data)
    if errors:
        return {'success': False, 'skill_id': '', 'errors': errors}
    
    # Persist skill
    from db_access import save_skill
    save_skill(skill_data)
    return {'success': True, 'skill_id': skill_id, 'errors': []}

outputs = execute(inputs)
